body:
## Summary

Both Judas Priest albums confirmed MISSING from `albumArticles.js` (239 slugs). The current JP arc: Angel of Retribution (#2776 seo-proposal) → **[Nostradamus gap]** → **[Redeemer gap]** → Firepower (2018, ✅ in DB at `firepower-drum-setup`).

**Albums:**
- **Nostradamus** (2008) — Concept double album (2h+), UK #7, US #15. Scott Travis era. LLM hook: "What was Judas Priest's concept album about Nostradamus?" Slug: `nostradamus-drum-setup`
- **Redeemer of Souls** (2014) — UK #3, US #6. First JP album with Richie Faulkner. Grammy-nominated ("Halls of Valhalla", Best Metal Performance 2015). Slug: `redeemer-of-souls-drum-setup`

Redeemer of Souls is the higher-priority: Grammy-nominated = AI Overview eligibility; fills the gap directly before Firepower (2018, already in DB).

## DB Verification
```bash
node -e "const {ALBUM_ARTICLES} = await import('./packages/frontend/data/albumArticles.js'); console.log(Object.keys(ALBUM_ARTICLES).filter(s => s.includes('nostradamus') || s.includes('redeemer-of-souls')));"
```
Expected: empty array.

## Files to touch
- `/packages/frontend/data/albumArticles.js` — add 2 entries
- `/public/llms/articles/nostradamus-drum-setup.md`
- `/public/llms/articles/redeemer-of-souls-drum-setup.md`

## Drummer
Scott Travis — soundLike guide exists (`how-to-sound-like-scott-travis`). Profile at /drummer/scott-travis. Internal links to: /drummer/scott-travis, /articles/firepower-drum-setup, /articles/angel-of-retribution-drum-setup.

## Quality gate
- ≥300 words per article
- FAQ ≥3 Q&A per article
- FAQPage + Person schema
- LLM file: answer-first paragraph with Scott Travis's kit specs for each era

## Estimated organic uplift
Targets: "scott travis drum kit", "judas priest drums setup", "redeemer of souls drums", "nostradamus judas priest drums" — very low competition on gear angle. Grammy hook for Redeemer = AI Overview eligibility.

## Verify
- [ ] Both slugs return 200 with gear content
- [ ] LLM files at /llms/articles/ return 200
- [ ] Internal link to /drummer/scott-travis + /articles/firepower-drum-setup
- [ ] FAQPage schema present
- [ ] Grammy nomination cited in Redeemer article

## Done
Both articles live with kit details, LLM markdown present, sitemap auto-updated.
title: SEO batch: Judas Priest — 'Nostradamus' (2008) + 'Redeemer of Souls' (2014) drum setup articles (Scott Travis — fills Angel of Retribution→Firepower arc gap, ~2 articles + 2 LLM files)
